A three-chapter pursuit thriller. POV: Henrik, a former Norwegian
search-and-rescue medic now living off-grid in the Lofoten archipelago.
A satellite-tracked package washes ashore. Within hours, two men he has
never seen are walking the only road off his island and the ferry has
been rerouted. He has thirty-six hours before the next storm window
closes the strait.

Three chapters: (1) discovery + first sighting (08:00–18:00 day one),
(2) cat-and-mouse across the archipelago (18:00–06:00 day two), (3) the
ferry-shed confrontation as the storm hits (06:00–14:00 day two).
Ticking-clock: storm window is the hard deadline.
